additional-properties.portal-proposal: Submission of details of Reserved Matters of Access, Appearance, Landscaping, Layout and Scale for buildings between 1 and 8-storeys in height, comprising of 209 new residential units together with a new community centre, energy centre, and retail floorspace, and associated hard and soft landscaping works and highways and infrastructure works and pursuant to Outline Planning Permission reference 2011/0734 dated 30 March 2012
additional-properties.notes: Draft submission data extracted from the completed application form and source document list. The completed form identifies the application as approval of reserved matters, while the planning authority portal labels it Discharge of Condition. The declaration is unsigned and undated in the available form, and open human checks remain in extraction-report.md.
